label: FAIL
rationale: The target HMAC returned SUCCESS without any prior HMACInit in the active session. The evidence says HMAC requires a previously opened HMAC stream and HMAC without an open stream shall result in an error/fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target HMACFinalize returned SUCCESS without any prior HMACInit opening an HMAC stream. The evidence says HMACFinalize with no open HMAC stream shall fail.

label: PASS
rationale: The target HMACInit returned SUCCESS when no HMAC stream was already open for the hash object. The evidence describes HMACInit as the method that initiates the HMAC stream and only forbids a second init while one is already open.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target HMACInit returned SUCCESS after a prior successful HMACInit on the same hash object and before any HMACFinalize. The evidence says a second HMACInit before HMACFinalize shall fail.

label: PASS
rationale: The target HMAC returned SUCCESS after HMACInit had opened an HMAC stream and before any HMACFinalize closed it. The evidence says HMAC requires that open stream state.

label: PASS
rationale: The target HMACFinalize returned SUCCESS after HMACInit had opened an HMAC stream. The evidence says HMACFinalize closes the open HMAC stream and only fails for the stream-state rule when no stream is open.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target HMAC returned SUCCESS after HMACFinalize had closed the previously opened HMAC stream. The evidence says HMAC after HMACFinalize, when no stream is open, shall result in an error/fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Encrypt returned SUCCESS without any prior EncryptInit opening an encryption stream. The evidence says Encrypt requires a previous EncryptInit and no later EncryptFinalize, and Encrypt before init shall result in an error.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target EncryptInit returned SUCCESS after a prior successful EncryptInit on the same credential object and before any EncryptFinalize. The evidence says a second EncryptInit before EncryptFinalize shall fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Encrypt returned SUCCESS after EncryptFinalize had closed the encryption stream. The evidence says Encrypt after EncryptFinalize, when no encryption stream is open, shall result in an error/fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Decrypt returned SUCCESS without any prior DecryptInit opening a decryption stream. The evidence says Decrypt requires an open stream created by DecryptInit, and Decrypt without an open stream shall fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target DecryptInit returned SUCCESS after a prior successful DecryptInit on the same credential object and before any DecryptFinalize. The evidence says a second DecryptInit before DecryptFinalize shall fail.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Decrypt returned SUCCESS after DecryptFinalize had closed the decryption stream. The evidence says invoking Decrypt when no stream is open, including after finalize, shall fail.
